jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Aurobindo Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Aurobindo Pharma has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aurobindo Pharma:
Aurobindo Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma!
